item.title: Meta signs multibillion-dollar deal for Amazon Graviton5 chips as AI compute demand outstrips $135B capex budget
item.description: Summary: Meta signed a multibillion-dollar, multi-year deal to deploy tens of millions of Amazon’s Graviton5 ARM CPU cores in AWS data centres for agentic AI workloads. The chips are general-purpose processors, not AI accelerators, handling the CPU-intensive … [Amazon, Meta]

item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. — As artificial intelligence spending continues to reshape the semiconductor industry in 2026, investors face a high-stakes choice among Nvidia, Intel and AMD. The three companies represent very different bets on the AI chip market, with N… [Intel, Nvidia, AMD]

item.title: A Terrible, Terrible Week in Software Stocks. But Not Necessarily a Terrible 12 Months.
item.description: This week was bad. Really bad. And Thursday was particularly brutal. ServiceNow was down 15-17% at the open. IBM off 10%. Salesforce down 7%. Oracle down 5%. Intuit down 7%. And the carnage spread to almost every major B2B name. The trigger was earnings from … [Oracle, IBM, ServiceNow, Salesforce]
